No modifications to `cli/internal/server/frontend/tailwind.config.js` (or Tailwind v4 `@theme` CSS) are present in the reviewed diff.
No evidence of running `bunx @google/design.md export --format tailwind` or of an exported theme JSON being committed.
The reviewed commit is purely execution-evidence bookkeeping; the substantive change appears to live in commit `00ddabd9` ("feat(frontend): wire DESIGN.md tokens into Tailwind v4 config") which was not included in the diff. Re-run review against `00ddabd9` to evaluate the actual wiring.
